content:
# Marine Pollution

**Summary**: Broad research theme addressed in the thesis collection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-mohammed|Mohammed, 2013]] contributed to the theme of Marine Pollution

- [[2015-akere|Akere, 2015]] assessed marine pollution in the form of organotins along the Saudi coast.

- [[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015]] assessed the impact of marine pollution on foraminiferal distribution and behavior in the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] assessed marine pollution in the form of microplastics along the East Coast of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023]] assessed marine pollution using foraminiferal indices and chemical proxies (TPH, PAH).

## Key Subtopics



- [[2015-akere|Akere, 2015]] assessed marine pollution in the form of organotins along the Saudi coast.

- [[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015]] assessed the impact of marine pollution on foraminiferal distribution and behavior in the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] assessed marine pollution in the form of microplastics along the East Coast of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023]] assessed marine pollution using foraminiferal indices and chemical proxies (TPH, PAH).

## Methods and Approaches Used



## Key Findings Across Sources

- contributed to the theme of Marine Pollution ([[2013-mohammed|Mohammed, 2013]])

- Several sediment samples from Jubail, Khobar, and Qatif exceeded the 5 ng/g Australian environmental quality guidelines for TBT. ([[2015-akere|Akere, 2015, p. 43]])

- Glabratellina sp. 1 was found in polluted locations in eastern Bahrain. ([[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015, p. 65]])

- Microplastic was found in all 24 samples from the four different beaches studied. ([[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022, p. 38]])

- The Uqair area is in the high category of EcoQS since the late 1950s due to its distance from urban centers. ([[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023, p. 54]])
